common.noCases: There are currently no closed cases
common.requestCloseStatus: Your request to close this case is pending and could take up to 24 hours to update.
common.CaseDesc: Thank you for contacting HP Support
common.CaseDesc1: Your case has been closed,Thank you for contacting HP Support
common.caseDesc2: We have opened a support case for the repair of product {{Nickname}}. A return shipment box, for you defective product, will be delivered to you within 2 to 3 business days
common.caseDesc3: Please fill out the Repair Feedback form describing the issue and follow the packaging and shipping instructions to send you product to the HP Repair Facility
common.thankYouForContactingHPSupport: Thank you for contacting HP Support.
common.weHaveOpenedASupportCaseForRepaire: We have opened a support case for the repair of {{product nickname}}. You will a receive box within 2 to 3 business days to ship your device back to us. Please fill out the Repair Request form and follow the packing and shipping instructions for your device.
common.thereAreNoOpenCases: There are currently no open cases
common.thereAreNoClosedCases: There are currently no closed cases
common.caseRequestClose_Status: Your request to close this case is pending and could take up to 24 hours to update.
common.caseStatusReturnDefectivePart: Please return defective part to HP
common.caseStatusReturnDefectivePart_LCase: please return defective part to HP
common.caseContentSentenceThankYouForContact: Thank you for contacting HP Support.
common.caseContentSentenceRepairFlow_PS1: We have opened a support case for the repair of product {{nickname}}. A return shipment box, for your defective product, will be delivered to you within 2 to 3 business days.
common.caseContentSentenceRepairFlow_PS2: Please fill out the Repair Feedback form describing the issue and follow the packing and shipping instructions to send your product to the HP Repair Facility.
common.caseContentSentenceRepairFlow_DP1: The HP Repair Facility has shipped packing materials to you today.
common.caseContentSentenceRepairFlow_DP2: Use these materials to return your HP product to our Repair Facility for service.
common.caseContentSentenceRepairFlow_RP1: The HP Repair Facility has received your product {{nickname}} for repair. Once the product is repaired, you will receive notification when it has been shipped to you.
common.caseContentSentenceRepairFlow_SC1: The HP Repair Facility has repaired your product {{nickname}} and shipped it back to you.
common.caseContentSentenceStandardExchange_DP1: We have opened a support case for product {{nickname}} and a replacement order is processing. A return shipping label will be emailed to you. Please follow the packing and shipping instructions to return your product/part to HP.
common.caseContentSentenceStandardExchange_DP2: If you have shipped your product/part you can obtain shipment status using the information below.
common.caseContentSentenceStandardExchange_RC1: The HP Repair Facility has received the replacement product/part {{nickname}}. You will receive notification when the replacement product/part has been shipped back to you.
common.caseContentSentenceStandardAdvancedExcha: HP has shipped your replacement product/part for {{nickname}}.
common.caseContentSentenceAdvancedExchange_SP1: We have opened a support case for a replacement order for your product {{nickname}}. A replacement product/part will be delivered to you within 2 to 5 business days.
common.caseContentSentenceAdvancedExchange_SP2: You will receive another notification when the product has been shipped.
common.caseContentSentenceCSRPart_SP1: We have opened a support case for a replacement part for your product {{nickname}}. A replacement part will be delivered to you. You will receive another notification when the product has been shipped.
common.caseContentSentenceCSRPart_SC1: HP has shipped your replacement part.
common.caseContentSentenceOptional_DP1: A return shipping label will be emailed to you. Please follow the packing and shipping instructions to return your defective part to HP.
common.caseContentSentenceOptional_DP2: If you have shipped your defective part, you can obtain shipment status using the information below.
common.caseContentSentenceOptional_RC1: The HP Repair Facility has received your defective part.
common.caseContentSentenceCDAX1: Please check Notifications periodically for updates on your support cases.
common.checkTheProblemAndTryAgain: Please check the problem description, and then try again.
common.describTheIssueClickChatNow: Please describe the issue you're experiencing so we can offer the most effective help. We will supply agent contact information after you click "Chat now".
